subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath migrated unto God and journeyed towards Him, until he entered the Sacred Precinct of Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ذکر الذی هاجر الی الله و سافر الیه الی ان دخل بقعه الفردوس مقام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
